sources.antenna: SDR #1 — MESA Marion Co. Public Safety (site A, NAC 261)

_notes: sysId 262 = MESA (Metropolitan Emergency Services, Indy metro).
Source #0 centered at 858 MHz covers Hamilton Co. control channels (856.8125–859.8125 MHz), NAC 264.
Source #1 centered at 857 MHz covers Marion Co. Public Safety control channels (856.1625–858.1875 MHz), NAC 261.
Hamilton control channels listed first — trunk-recorder tries them in order; Marion PS is the fallback set.
To switch to Indiana SAFE-T (sysId 6BD), point talkgroupsFile to /app/talkgroups/6BD.csv and rebuild control_channel_list from 6BD.sites.csv.
device: rtl=serial:TRUNK0 — set once per dongle: rtl_eeprom -d 0 -s TRUNK0
MQTT topic 'jitr' must match MQTT_TOPIC_PREFIX in compose.yml
